articles.title: Rutte and Polish officials cheer Trump’s U-turn on NATO troops in Europe - politico.eu
articles.description: Warsaw hailed the move as proof Poland remains Washington’s “ironclad ally.”
articles.content: Marcin Przydacz, Nawrocki's foreign policy adviser, said in a radio interview that the policy reversal was the result of presidential diplomacy rooted in the personal relationship between the two pre… [+1207 chars]
